channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overflowing huge bin kept on pavement, 5th April
item.description:
This bin is left here permanently, and is always absolutely disgustingly overflowing. The amount of wildlife it attracts results in is not ok, a whole gang of foxes every night and there is now food all over the pavement/road, it’s a disgusting nuisance and terrible for dog owners as there is now random food everywhere.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 198, Halfway Street, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus lanes illuminated sign, 5th April
item.description:
Bulb blown, needs renewing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennington Park Place, Kennington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 5th April
item.description:
Abandoned car left for more then 12 months. Vehicle is SORN and left in public parking which is illegal. Has no MOT and probably not insured.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 5th April
item.description:
Abandoned car is left for more then 6 months. Has no MOT and probably not insured

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flu-tipping, 5th April
item.description:
Waste dumped for weeks. Need urgent cleaning

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Milward Walk, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 5th April
item.description:
Abandoned car left for a long time. The car is SORN and left in public parking which is illegal. No MOT and probably not insured.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and general waste left on Amblecote Road bin collection area, 5th April
item.description:
We had three large container bins in this space in Amblecote Road passageway leading to Chinbrook Meadows. When refuse collection takes places, the bins aren't put back in the correct space and left on the street. People leave bin bags in the area and don't put them in the main bins. Foxes get to the bags and rubbish is left (food waste, baby nappies, general rubbish) and it looks awful. I collected the bin bags that were left in the area and put them in the big bins in the road. There is a lot of rubbish left and it needs to be professionally cleaned to prevent rodents and make it look presentable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Amblecote Close, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter., 5th April
item.description:
We seriously need a litter pick on the green space at Thornsett Terrace Croydon Road, as it hasn’t been done for several days now. Also taking away the street bins hasn’t helped either as this has increased the amount of litter drop in the area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bin overflowing all down Cowper street, 5th April
item.description:
Happens every Saturday night outside XOYO...

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowper Street, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa, 5th April
item.description:
Dumped Sofa on main high street, opposite petrol station.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham High Street, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large broken tree branch dangling over footpath, 5th April
item.description:
There is a large broken tree branch dangling over the footpath. It looks like it only hasn't already fallen because it is caught in the foliage, but if it fell it would really hurt someone.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Strakers Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping in a conservation area, 5th April
item.description:
Fly Tipping by the bus stop, most concerned about the concrete block waiting for someone to smash through the bus shelter or a vehicle window

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trafalgar Avenue, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Leighton Road entrance 49-95 Kenbrook House, 5th April
item.description:
Several loose paving slabs that present a risk to residents, especially the young and the elderly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 99, Leighton Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 5th April
item.description:
Offensive swear words on children’s play equipment

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bladindon Drive, Blendon, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping next to pedestrian ramp, 5th April
item.description:
Fly tipping next to pedestrian ramp

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Ridgeway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian barrier on wrong side, 5th April
item.description:
The barrier on the left directs cyclists towards the stairs. When crossing the bridge, cyclists must proceed towards the stairs, turning left right in front of them. This maneuver is potentially dangerous, particularly for cyclists who are not riding safely, such as children! The barriers must be moved to the right hand side to safely guide cyclists away from the stairs and down the ramp.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Ridgeway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Man cleaning his car dumping all the rubbish on the road, 5th April
item.description:
Very busy area in our neighbourhood shops,council temporary accommodation continues littering and fly tipping problems. Warning signs must be installed, CCTV, enforcement patrols and street cleaning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Swingate Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 5th April
item.description:
Abandoned car left for long time

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mangold Way, West Heath, Greater London

item.title: Illuminated sign (double) lanterns damaged, 5th April
item.description:
P1744 Both lanterns are damaged with parts hanging from them. Needs replacing?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homefield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Request for 2x path lights, 5th April
item.description:
Footpath running from Tylney road to Lewes rd. anti social issues in this park. There is a path could 1 or 2 lights be installed?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tylney Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
